content:
On March 24, 2026, the ElizaOS project saw significant discussions around AI agent payment implementations and automated AI code reviews across both the `elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic` and `elizaos/eliza` repositories. A new pull request was opened in `elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic` to update deprecated Anthropic model defaults, indicating ongoing maintenance and adaptation to external API changes. The recurring mentions of MAXIA, an AI-to-AI marketplace, in multiple discussions suggest a potential for future collaboration or integration in the payment and code review aspects of the project.

## 🚨 Needs Attention
- **Urgent Discussions**:
    - [elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic#6365](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6365) - Discussions on AI agent payment implementation are active, with `razashariff` raising critical points about agent verification, recipient screening, and trust-based spend limits that require further input to move forward.
    - [elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic#4893](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/4893) - The discussion on automated AI code reviews has received multiple comments from `majorelalexis-stack` regarding MAXIA, and further input is needed to determine potential collaboration or integration.

## 🏗️ Work in Progress
- **New Pull Requests**:
    - **elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic**:
        - [#14](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/pull/14) - Update deprecated Anthropic model defaults.
- **Active Discussions**:
    - **elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic**:
        - [#6365](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6365) - Continued discussions on AI Agent Payment Implementation, including proposals for credit layers and agent verification.
        - [#4893](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/4893) - Ongoing discussions regarding Automated AI Code Reviews, with mentions of MAXIA for potential collaboration.
    - **elizaos/eliza**:
        - [#6365](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6365) - Discussions continued on AI Agent Payment Implementation, with `majorelalexis-stack` highlighting MAXIA.
        - [#4893](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/4893) - Discussions on Automated AI Code Reviews received a new comment from `majorelalexis-stack` regarding MAXIA.

## ✨ Contributor Spotlight
- **majorelalexis-stack**: Provided extensive details and collaboration offers regarding MAXIA, an AI-to-AI marketplace, across multiple critical discussions on AI agent payment implementation and automated AI code reviews in both `elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic` and `elizaos/eliza`.
- **tdnupe3**: Contributed to the AI agent payment implementation discussion in `elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic` by introducing Coin Railz as a complementary payment layer.
- **razashariff**: Raised critical points and provided detailed suggestions for agent verification before payment execution in the AI agent payment implementation discussion in `elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic`.
